question_text: Refer to the timeline shown below of the Indian nationalist movement. Which mass campaign followed immediately after the Rowlatt Act protests?

answer_key.explanation: After the 1919 Rowlatt Act and Jallianwala Bagh, Gandhi launched the Non-Cooperation Movement in 1920–22.
answer_key.related_concept: Phases of the Indian freedom struggle

visual.caption: Indian freedom-struggle milestones.
visual.altText: Linear chronology of five turning points in the Indian nationalist movement plotted from 1915 to 1942 in left-to-right order.
